title: Add policy validation Job before Deployment rollout
summary: Well-structured implementation of pre-deployment oslo.policy validation via a short-lived Kubernetes Job. All external review feedback (B-001, W-001 through W-004) has been properly addressed: E2E Chainsaw test added, DeletePropagationBackground on Job deletion, typed constants for condition strings, error logging in pod list query, and TODO(CC-0042) for resource propagation. Unit tests (16), integration tests (2), and E2E tests (1 Chainsaw suite with 9 steps) provide comprehensive coverage across all tiers. Code passes go vet and golangci-lint clean on changed files. No new bugs introduced by the fixes.

tests_checklist.item: Unit tests exist and pass (16 tests, 0.835s)
Integration tests exist and pass (2 tests)
Job spec validation tested (image, security context, command, backoff, TTL, mounts, termination policy)
ObservedGeneration tested on all condition paths
E2E: condition transitions, Job existence, deployment gating, cleanup on removal

code_quality_checklist.item: Typed constants for condition strings (W-002 fix)
Error logged before fallback in getValidationErrorMessage (W-004 fix)
TODO(CC-0042) for resource propagation gap (W-003 fix)
Functions are single-responsibility and appropriately sized
No dead code or commented-out code

security_checklist.item: RBAC markers present for pods (get, list)

architecture_checklist.item: Validation gates Deployment via early-exit pattern
Three lifecycle paths (skip, validate, cleanup) follow sub-reconciler contract
Uses shared job.RunJob for stale detection and lifecycle management
Job name derived from CR name (multi-instance safe)

dry_yagni_checklist.item: Uses existing job.RunJob instead of reimplementing lifecycle

fail_fast_checklist.item: Errors detected early via pre-deployment validation
Descriptive error messages from Pod termination messages
Fallback message with kubectl command for manual inspection

defensive_checklist.item: Pod list query error logged before fallback
Job not-found on delete handled via client.IgnoreNotFound

suggested_improvements: Minor naming inconsistency: conditionReasonNotRequired uses bare 'NotRequired' while sibling reconcilers use '{Feature}NotRequired' (e.g., HPANotRequired, NetworkPolicyNotRequired, TrustFlushNotRequired). Not blocking — condition reasons are scoped per condition type — but standardizing to 'PolicyValidationNotRequired' would improve consistency. Deferring since the value is already used in E2E assertions and changing it would cascade across fixtures.
next_steps: PR is ready to merge. All blocking, critical, and major checks pass.
When CC-0042 lands, wire spec.Resources to the validation Job container.
